prospects.name: The Balance (Personal Finance)
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Major PF site covering mortgages, budgeting, retirement. Widget would complement their calculator section.
prospects.pitch_angle: Complement your existing mortgage calculators with our free embeddable affordability widget
prospects.risk: LOW — reputable media site, editorial decision likely

prospects.name: Mortgage Calculator (.org)
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Dedicated mortgage calculator site. Widget would be a natural fit.
prospects.authority: DR 70+, ranks for competitive mortgage terms
prospects.pitch_angle: Your users already calculate mortgages — our widget adds affordability analysis without leaving your page
prospects.risk: MEDIUM — competitor overlap, but widget is complementary

prospects.name: Credit Karma (Resource Section)
prospects.relevance: MEDIUM-HIGH — Massive audience. Their mortgage section could feature our widget.
prospects.pitch_angle: Your mortgage education section would benefit from an interactive affordability calculator — free, no signup, embeddable
prospects.risk: HIGH — large corp, may ignore cold outreach

prospects.name: Financial Samurai
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Well-known PF blog with engaged audience. Already pinned on Pinterest.
prospects.pitch_angle: Your readers care about financial independence — our mortgage affordability widget helps them make smarter housing decisions
prospects.risk: LOW — individual blogger, easier to reach

prospects.name: HousingWire
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Mortgage/real estate industry news. Resource pages could feature tools.
prospects.pitch_angle: Your mortgage professional audience needs reliable calculators — our widget is free, accurate, and embeddable
prospects.risk: MEDIUM — B2B audience, widget is B2C. May prefer industry tools.

next_step: Auditor final review → draft personalized emails → send via Gmail SMTP if approved
